svg.title: Swap & Bridge
svg.desc: Merchants convert and move funds self-custodially — Solana via Jupiter, EVM swaps and bridges via Zerion.
svg.text: Merchants convert and move funds self-custodially — Solana via Jupiter, EVM swaps and bridges via Zerion.
Secant never holds funds; swaps execute from your

Minimum received is enforced on-chain; it reverts
Jupiter for Solana, Zerion for EVM swaps and bridges.
